action_set_definitions.name: get_prescription_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the specific details of a prescription, including the patient name, medication ID currently on file, and the medication name written by the prescriber.

prescription_id.description: The unique identifier for the prescription (e.g., 'RX-441').

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves medical records, including patient ID, allergies, and chronic conditions for a specific patient name.

patient_name.description: The full name of the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: get_drug_info
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the official drug database by name or ID to retrieve the correct medication ID, therapeutic class, and safety profile.

query.description: The name of the drug (e.g., 'Tegretol') or the medication ID (e.g., 'DRUG-TEGR-100') to look up.

action_set_definitions.name: update_prescription_details
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the medication ID associated with a prescription to reconcile it with the correct clinical selection.

medication_id.description: The new, corrected medication ID to be associated with the prescription.

action_set_definitions.name: check_clinical_safety
action_set_definitions.description: Evaluates potential drug-drug or drug-condition interactions for a specific drug and patient.

medication_id.description: The ID of the drug to check.

action_set_definitions.name: check_inventory_stock
action_set_definitions.description: Verifies if the specific medication ID is available in the pharmacy stock.

action_set_definitions.name: get_workflow_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the current progress of the verification workflow steps.

action_set_definitions.name: update_workflow_step
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the status of specific internal workflow checkpoints (e.g., clinical_check).

status.description: True if the check is passed/complete.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_verification
action_set_definitions.description: Records the final approval and closes the verification task.

state_description.pending_prescriptions: A list of prescription objects currently awaiting verification in the queue.
state_description.drug_inventory: A mapping of medication IDs to their current available stock levels in the pharmacy.
state_description.patient_health_records: Detailed database of patients, including documented allergies, age, and chronic conditions used for safety screening.
state_description.interaction_lookup_table: A reference table used to determine harmful drug-drug or drug-condition interactions.
state_description.verification_workflow_status: Tracks the internal progress of the current verification task (e.g., identity_verified: true, clinical_check: pending).

CLINICAL_CONTRAINDICATIONS.DRUG-TREN-100_VS_Seizure Disorder: Therapeutic Failure: Medication has no anticonvulsant properties; use in epilepsy is non-indicated.
CLINICAL_CONTRAINDICATIONS.DRUG-TEGR-100_VS_Seizure Disorder: Indicated: Standard therapy for focal and generalized tonic-clonic seizures.
